objective: Install a real LaunchRoom Starter profile layer, not only create a blank Hermes profile.
allowed_after_confirmation: write workspace README.md, AGENTS.md, and HERMES.md
install local LaunchRoom starter skills into the target profile

workspace AGENTS.md and HERMES.md exist or are explicitly deferred
starter skills exist or are explicitly deferred
